global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on the product and promotional messages.
global.main_message: Promoting the VantaStyle app with a focus on bestsellers and a sale.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A rectangular area at the top featuring a product display, possibly with a placeholder for an image.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' is prominently displayed at the top, styled in a modern font.

elements.label: App screenshot placeholder
elements.description: A centered rectangular area that likely represents a screenshot of the app interface.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner that reads 'SALE' in bold text.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Text in the center that reads 'Your next favorite pick Shop bestsellers now', inviting users to explore.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text area displaying the price '€29.99' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom that says 'Install now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: Text at the bottom encouraging users to shop bestsellers, enhancing the ad's appeal.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Secondary promotional text
elements.description: Additional text at the bottom reinforcing the call to action with 'Install now'.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'VantaStyle' is positioned at the top, drawing immediate attention.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small 'SALE' text badge indicating a promotional offer, enhancing urgency.
